questions.question: By next year, I ___ finished my studies.
She ___ completed the project by Friday.
By 2030, they ___ built 100 new schools.
Will you ___ eaten by 7 pm?
He ___ worked here for 10 years by December.
By the time she calls, I'll ___ already left.
They ___ not finished the report by tomorrow morning.
By next month, we'll have ___ enough money.
She will have ___ the whole novel before the weekend.
By the time you arrive, I ___ cooked dinner.
By next summer, she ___ graduated from university.
They will have ___ the contract by Monday morning.
I'll have ___ the report before the deadline.
By the time we arrive, the meeting ___ already ended.
She will have ___ here for 20 years by next December.
Will they ___ solved the problem by then?
___ he have finished the course by the end of the year?
By 2050, scientists ___ found a cure for many diseases.
I'll have ___ this book before our next meeting.
By the time you get here, I'll ___ already started cooking.
She ___ completed all her training by next month.
They'll have ___ together for 25 years next June.
By midnight, we'll have ___ over 500 kilometres.
Will you have ___ the project by the time I return?
He'll have ___ by the time his youngest child starts school.
By the end of this week, I'll have ___ enough for the ticket.
The builders will have ___ the bridge by spring.
___ they have left by the time we arrive?
By next week, she'll have ___ all the thank-you cards.
I'll have ___ here for two years next March.
He'll have ___ the whole series before the weekend.
By the time the project ends, the team ___ worked together for three years.
She will have ___ over 10,000 km by the end of the race.
Will the students have ___ all the chapters by Friday?
By the time he's 40, he'll have ___ five novels.
I won't ___ submitted my application before the deadline.
By next semester, they'll have ___ over 500 new words.
She will have ___ breakfast before the meeting starts.
By the time you read this, I'll ___ already gone home.
